topic: Configure Log Analytics workspace retention and tables
key_facts: If you need to retain data for 30 days only to comply with a privacy policy, configure the default workspace retention to 30 days using the API and update the immediatePurgeDataOn30Days workspace property to true .
CLI and PowerShell are limited to seven years; support for 12 years will follow.
Basic and Auxiliary tables only have a total retention period, which is 30 days by default.
This operation is currently only supported using the Workspaces - Update API .

Example 

 This example sets the workspace's retention to the workspace default of 30 days and ensures that data is immediately removed after 30 days and is nonrecoverable.
To reduce charges, set table-level retention to four days, which is the minimum supported period.
Long-term retention : In this low-cost state, data isn't available for table plan features, but can be accessed through search jobs .
